mapper.sql: id, image_url, link_url, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM banner WHERE status <> -1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT id, image_url, link_url, sort_order, status, create_time FROM banner WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner (image_url, link_url, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
